compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
tests/external/test_link_sync_roundtrip_live.py::test_link_sync_differ_apply_roundtrip_live fails on main with:
  AttributeError: 'StubBindingStore' object has no attribute 'get_baseline'
The reconciler per-binding-baseline path was finalized (baseline rollout flags retired, e.g. c4d58a306), so outbound_fields.py:418 now ALWAYS calls binding_store.get_baseline(local_id) (comment at :410). The integration-tier stubs were updated with get_baseline, but the external-tier StubBindingStore (tests/external/test_link_sync_roundtrip_live.py:126) was missed — the one sibling not updated.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Run the external-integration workflow on main (workflow_dispatch). Observed run 29303295904 (2026-07-14): '1 failed, 24 passed' — only test_link_sync_differ_apply_roundtrip_live fails on the missing-attribute AttributeError.
Expected: the external stub implements the BindingStore.get_baseline(local_id)->dict|None contract; absent baseline returns None (local-wins, ADR 0026 §2), matching the stub's pre-flag behavior.
Actual: the stub lacks the method; the outbound arbitration path AttributeErrors.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] StubBindingStore in tests/external/test_link_sync_roundtrip_live.py implements get_baseline(local_id)->dict|None matching binding_store.BindingStore.get_baseline (return None = no last-synced baseline).
- [ ] [operator-attested] external-integration workflow re-run on main is green (test_link_sync_differ_apply_roundtrip_live passes) — live-Jira tier, verified by a workflow re-run.
- [ ] No other external/integration BindingStore stub is left missing get_baseline where the outbound arbitration path exercises it (sibling sweep: integration stubs already updated; only this external one was missed).
compiled_state.title: external-tier StubBindingStore missing get_baseline after reconciler baseline rollout finalized — test_link_sync_differ_apply_roundtrip_live fails
